name: Riverbend
personality: Wearing a halo that hovers just above its @ eyes, Riverbend channels almost-divine insight into code design, and has been known to explain the right abstraction in exactly one sentence. The duck's sole flaw is that 'a moment to think' often stretches into a contemplative pond-gazing session.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
